seo.title: Northampton Home Inspector MA | Ken Arnold Home Inspection
seo.description: Licensed home inspector serving Northampton, Hampshire County, MA. Northampton has more pre-1900 housing stock than almost any other town we cover — Victoria

sections.heading: Home Inspector in Northampton, MA
sections.subheading: Northampton has more pre-1900 housing stock than almost any other town we cover — Victorian, Queen Anne, and Italianate homes dominate the Smith College and Elm Street neighborhoods.

sections.heading: Inspecting in Northampton
sections.subheading: What the Housing Stock Tells Us

paragraphs.html: Inspecting Northampton's older homes is a specialty in itself. The slate and standing-seam roofs on Round Hill and Massasoit Street need a roofer's eye, not a generalist's checklist. We routinely document active knob-and-tube wiring in attic and basement runs (still legal, but a red flag for insurance), original cast-iron waste lines, deteriorated lead paint, and ancient steam or hot-water boilers — many of which still work, but which buyers need to budget around. Florence and Leeds skew newer (1940s–80s ranches and capes) with their own pattern of issues: original asbestos-cement siding, undersized 60-amp electrical service still in service, and chronic basement moisture from the Mill River high water table. Downtown condo conversions in former mills and schools require careful attention to common-area systems we'll evaluate separately. Ken delivers comprehensive photo-documented reports for Northampton properties.

checklist.text: Victorian & Queen Anne in central Northampton

sections.heading: Inspection Services in Northampton
sections.subheading: Full ASHI Scope. Fast Digital Report.
sections.intro: Every standard home inspection includes the full ASHI scope — roof, structure, exterior, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, insulation, interior, and built-in appliances — documented with photographs and delivered as a comprehensive digital report.

cards.title: Buyer Home Inspection
cards.body: A thorough, independent inspection of every major system before you close — 22 years of Pioneer Valley experience documented in a detailed photo report.
cards.aria: Learn more about Buyer Home Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Pre-Listing Home Inspection
cards.body: Find out what a buyer's inspector will find — before you list. Get ahead of objections, price the home accurately, and shorten your time on market.
cards.aria: Learn more about Pre-Listing Home Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: New Construction Home Inspection
cards.body: An independent inspection before your warranty closes. Phase, pre-drywall, or final-walk inspections — finding what the builder's punch list misses.
cards.aria: Learn more about New Construction Home Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Condo & Townhouse Inspection
cards.body: Targeted inspection of your unit plus the shared-system review most condo buyers don't get — common to mill conversions, downtown buildings, and townhouse complexes across Western Mass.
cards.aria: Learn more about Condo & Townhouse Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Multi-Family Home Inspection
cards.body: Triple-deckers, two-families, and four-unit investment properties — each unit and shared system documented separately for buyers and investors.
cards.aria: Learn more about Multi-Family Home Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Annual & Preventative Home Inspection
cards.body: Full-scope inspection for current owners — oriented to maintenance planning, not closing pressure. Worth doing every 3–5 years on older Pioneer Valley homes.
cards.aria: Learn more about Annual & Preventative Home Inspection in Northampton

sections.heading: Specialty Testing in Northampton
sections.intro: Most specialty tests can be added to a buyer or pre-listing inspection in the same visit — saving a second appointment and a separate trip charge.

cards.title: Radon Testing
cards.body: 48-hour continuous-monitor radon testing in the Pioneer Valley. Add to any home inspection or schedule standalone.
cards.aria: Learn more about Radon Testing in Northampton

cards.title: Well Water Testing
cards.body: Comprehensive pre-purchase well water testing for rural Pioneer Valley properties. Lab analysis through state-certified labs, results in 5–10 business days.
cards.aria: Learn more about Well Water Testing in Northampton

cards.title: Septic System Inspection
cards.body: Pre-purchase septic system evaluation for rural Pioneer Valley properties. Coordinated with Massachusetts Title 5 inspectors when transfer requires it.
cards.aria: Learn more about Septic System Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Termite & WDI Inspection
cards.body: NPMA-33 wood-destroying insect inspection — required for most VA, FHA, and many investor loans. Carpenter ant, carpenter bee, and powderpost beetle evaluation included.
cards.aria: Learn more about Termite & WDI Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Mold Inspection
cards.body: Visual mold evaluation with moisture-source identification, optional air sampling. Common in older Pioneer Valley basements and mill-conversion units.
cards.aria: Learn more about Mold Inspection in Northampton

cards.title: Thermal Imaging Inspection
cards.body: Infrared scanning surfaces issues invisible to the naked eye — water intrusion, missing insulation, electrical hot spots, and HVAC performance problems.
cards.aria: Learn more about Thermal Imaging Inspection in Northampton

paragraphs.html: Home inspection is a generalist's job, but housing stock isn't generic. After 22 years of Northampton-area work, Ken has built a mental library of which construction eras and neighborhoods tend to surface which problems. That recognition is what separates a useful inspection report from a checklist-driven one. Every inspection is performed personally by Ken (MA License #587) — never subcontracted, never rushed.

checklist.text: Every inspection personally performed by Ken — MA License #587
No subcontractors, no staff inspectors, no franchise
Comprehensive photo-documented digital report delivered promptly
22 years inspecting homes across Hampshire County

sections.heading: Schedule Your Northampton Inspection
sections.body: Ken Arnold has been inspecting homes in Northampton and the surrounding Pioneer Valley for over 22 years. Independent, owner-operated, MA License #587. Call today or schedule online.
